RuleSet.Name: InstallSchemaMssCF-wsl.bash
RuleSet.GenFile: #!/bin/bash $MssBashScriptLicense$ MAJOR_VERSION=$reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer Name$ MINOR_VERSION=$reference MinorVersion Name$ pushd lib$lower SchemaName$msscf sudo make install sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} sudo chmod 755 /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/$lower SchemaName$msscf sudo sh -c "cd /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/$lower SchemaName$msscf && chmod 644 *.hpp" #sudo chmod 755 /usr/bin/*$lower SchemaName$*msscf sudo chmod 755 /usr/lib/*$lower SchemaName$msscf.la sudo chmod 755 /usr/lib/*$lower SchemaName$msscf.so* sudo chmod 755 /opt/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ sudo chmod 755 /opt/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} sudo chmod 755 /opt/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/xsd sudo chmod 644 /opt/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/xsd/*$lower SchemaName$*.xsd sudo ldconfig popd
